description: The counterparty's own tracked changes are already ACCEPTED (w:ins/w:del artifacts remain in the OOXML as history but every revision has accepted=true). Documented rule: accept the counterparty's own accepted changes -- the resulting clause text is unambiguous, so this normalizes cleanly.

paragraphs.heading: Limitation on Liability
paragraphs.text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.

revisions.author: counterparty
revisions.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $100,000.
revisions.resulting_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.
